hero.title: Shift Planner
hero.description: Plan daytime and overnight shifts, assign a lightweight roster, prevent conflicts, and review net scheduled hours.

differences.title: Scheduling without HR overhead
differences.description: A focused planner for individuals and small teams.

items.title: Reuse patterns
items.description: Store default start, end, and break times.

items.title: Assign clearly
items.description: Keep only lightweight member contact labels.

items.title: Review net time
items.description: See break-adjusted scheduled and completed hours.

feel.title: Clear on every screen
feel.description: Responsive cards keep timing, assignment, status, and conflicts understandable.

items.title: Practical
items.description: Create, edit, search, filter, and delete durable records.

items.title: Accurate
items.description: Overnight and break calculations stay consistent after edits.

items.title: Safe history
items.description: Referenced types and members are deactivated instead of destroying history.

audiences.title: Who uses Shift Planner
audiences.description: Built for personal schedules and small informal teams.

items.title: Family businesses
items.description: Coordinate a small roster without enterprise tools.

items.title: Service teams
items.description: Track assigned hours, locations, and statuses.

resourceSection.title: Planning essentials
resourceSection.description: The first release stays deliberately focused.

items.title: Members
items.description: Optional assignees with lightweight contact details.

items.title: Shifts
items.description: Daytime or overnight records with conflict checks.

groupedSection.title: One focused workspace
groupedSection.description: Manage schedule records without payroll or attendance claims.

items.name: Assignments
items.description: Assign an active member or leave a shift open.

items.name: Timing
items.description: Support overnight work and back-to-back boundaries.

items.name: Filters
items.description: Combine search, status, type, member, period, and date filters.

items.name: Metrics
items.description: Review upcoming shifts and net hours.

technicalSection.title: Private and owner scoped
technicalSection.description: Shift Planner uses an isolated database and authenticated APIs.
items: Every record belongs to the signed-in user.
Cancelled shifts do not block new assignments.
No payroll, biometric, legal-compliance, notification, or AI features.
